steps.t: Nona is in the north-eastern corner of Lhanuch. Candaith has asked you to check on Nona to see how she is dealing with the death of her brother.
Wadu's favourite tree is on a rise west of Lhanuch, overlooking the ox-pens. Nona has asked you to recover the Rohirrim sword she left at Wadu's favou…
Nona is in the north-eastern corner of Lhanuch. You have recovered the sword from Wadu's favourite tree and should now bring it to Nona as she request…
